extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed By the Company, Subsidiary, Directors and Promoter from matters Against them. I counted only Against rows: criminal proceedings are 1 against the Company plus 1 against the Promoter (the same MCA complaint is separately included in both categories per note (1)); statutory/regulatory actions are 8 against the Company plus 1 against the Promoter; and tax proceedings are 9 against the Company plus 1 against the Subsidiary. For the aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiary, I used ₹1,250.75 million for the Company plus ₹0.23 million for the Subsidiary, excluding the Promoter’s ₹28.15 million, giving ₹1,250.98 million; the stated contingent-liabilities aggregate is ₹185.15 million as of September 30, 2022, excluding the not-determinable provident-fund liability. The top-five customer concentration is company-wide, based on revenue from operations for the full Fiscal 2022, and is 37.25%; no company-wide top-ten percentage is disclosed. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10: ₹1,250.98 million = ₹125.098 crore and ₹185.15 million = ₹18.515 crore.
